Ship a lean npm package

Publish only dist, README.md, and LICENSE from package.json files; keep wiki/, wiki-site/, and assets/wikiwiki-banner.png in the repository but out of the npm package, and load the README banner from the GitHub-hosted asset URL.

Home / Decisions
Decision packagereleasenpm

Context

Before PRISM depends on Wikiwiki, the @thjodann/wk tarball should contain the CLI runtime and package documentation without generated dogfood output or large decorative assets.

Decision

Publish only dist, README.md, and LICENSE from package.json files; keep wiki/, wiki-site/, and assets/wikiwiki-banner.png in the repository but out of the npm package, and load the README banner from the GitHub-hosted asset URL.

Consequences

The package stays small and intentional while installed users can still run wk render and wk site to generate Markdown and static wiki output inside their own repos.

Related files

  • package.json
  • README.md
  • LICENSE
  • test/cli.test.js
